personas.name: Frugal User
personas.description: A budget-conscious user who values free or low-cost apps and is sensitive to subscription prices.
goals: Get a useful mood tracking app without overspending
context: Seeking affordable mental health tracking solutions

personas.name: Tech-Savvy Troubleshooter
personas.description: A user who experiences technical issues and seeks reliable app performance.
goals: Use an app that works smoothly without technical issues
context: Seeking a reliable and stable app experience

personas.name: Engaged Enthusiast
personas.description: A user who values a positive user experience and enjoys using the app.
goals: Have a pleasant and engaging experience with the app
context: Seeking an enjoyable and user-friendly app

personas.name: Mental Health Advocate
personas.description: A user who seeks helpful insights and therapy features from the app.
goals: Gain useful insights and track mood effectively
pain_points: Some users find insights too obvious or broad
context: Seeking a helpful mental health tracking app
constraints: Values accuracy and relevance of insights

personas.name: Privacy-Conscious User
personas.description: A user who prioritizes data privacy and security.
goals: Protect personal data and maintain app security
context: Seeking a secure and private app experience
